label: Messenger (browser) — Send arrow
notes: PLACEHOLDER. THE original v1.10.2 regression target. Open messenger.com (or Messenger via Facebook) in your browser, focus a conversation, type a character so the Send arrow lights up, then capture. UIA will fail (DOM is opaque to UIA). Vision-only and uia-then-vision will both fall through to vision; this is where the harness's signal matters most.
